# TUnit — Daily DevOps & .NET

> TUnit is a modern, source-generated .NET test framework with NativeAOT support, parallel execution by default, and Roslyn-powered diagnostics.

Source: https://daily-devops.net/tags/tunit/
Generated: 2026-06-19

## About this topic

- [Topic landing page](https://daily-devops.net/tags/tunit/): TUnit is a modern, source-generated .NET test framework with NativeAOT support, parallel execution by default, and Roslyn-powered diagnostics.
- [Back to all topics](https://daily-devops.net/tags/)
- [Site index](https://daily-devops.net/llms.txt)

## Articles tagged "TUnit" (2)

- [TUnit.Mocks: No Castle, No Reflection, No Drama](https://daily-devops.net/posts/tunit-mocks-source-generated/): TUnit.Mocks brings source-generated, AOT-compatible mocks to .NET. No Castle.DynamicProxy, no runtime reflection. A practical comparison with NSubstitute.
- [TUnit — A Pragmatic Evaluation for .NET Teams](https://daily-devops.net/posts/tunit-a-pragmatic-evaluation-for-dotnet-teams/): A pragmatic TUnit evaluation for .NET teams - comparing performance, maintainability, and ecosystem readiness against MSTest, xUnit, and NUnit frameworks.
